title: Marketing Associate
description:
We are seeking an experienced Marketing professional to join our Meta Singapore to execute the business marketing strategy for key solutions that impact all our platforms.

The person that fills this role will be responsible for cross-platform business narrative and programs across APAC by partnering with global teams and in country marketing leaders. The person will leverage communication skills, an eye for visually powerful communication, and the ability to work across a broad range of marketing programs/projects to collaborate with product marketers, country marketing managers and sales leaders. The candidate will need to combine strategic-thinking, creativity and a hands-on approach to successfully execute on high-impact, scalable ideas and campaigns.

Responsibilities

  • Lead development of the cross- platform business marketing strategy to advertisers
  • Understand the needs of the advertisers, challenges and opportunities to create compelling narratives to drive preference and adoption of our platforms
  • Develop outbound marketing strategy, positioning narrative, content and sales enablement materials to support product launches,educate partners and drive adoption of Facebook’s media monetization products in partnership with product marketing and in-country marketing teams
  • Drive priority projects and play a consultant role with Country marketing leads to help with the activations around the Facebook business brand on ground in key APAC markets
  • Partner with cross-functional counterparts, Facebook Global Business Marketing and Facebook sales management to align strategy, programs, messaging and resources
  • Track, analyze and communicate key quantitative metrics
  • Manage program budgets

Minimum qualifications

  • Bachelor's degree or higher
  • 2+ years with experience in developing and executing marketing communications in media, advertising, tech, product marcoms or digital space
  • Strong storytelling skills and experience with running projects with cross-functional teams
  • Experience in scaling programs across multiple countries APAC


Meta builds technologies that help people connect, find communities, and grow businesses. When Facebook launched in 2004, it changed the way people connect. Apps like Messenger, Instagram and WhatsApp further empowered billions around the world. Now, Meta is moving beyond 2D screens toward immersive experiences like augmented and virtual reality to help build the next evolution in social technology. People who choose to build their careers by building with us at Meta help shape a future that will take us beyond what digital connection makes possible today—beyond the constraints of screens, the limits of distance, and even the rules of physics.
